node.text: Melanie bought figurines that remind her of family love.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "buy figurines purchase") on Session 19 (Score: 0.78)

node.text: Melanie is a big fan of pottery and finds it calming and creative.
Melanie has a strong connection to art, considering it both a sanctuary and a source of comfort.
Pottery is a significant part of Melanie's life as it helps her express her emotions and brings her joy.
